mapper.select:
SELECT b.board_no, b.title, b.writer_name, b.view_cnt, TO_CHAR(b.reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS reg_date, COUNT(c.comt_no) AS comtCnt FROM tb_board b LEFT JOIN tb_comment c ON b.board_no = c.board_no AND c.comt_del_yn = 'N' WHERE b.del_yn = 'N'
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND content LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%')
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%'))
GROUP BY b.board_no, b.title, b.writer_name, b.view_cnt, b.reg_date ORDER BY b.board_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageNo}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_board WHERE del_yn = 'N'
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND content LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%')
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%'))
SELECT board_no, title, content, writer_name, view_cnt, TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS reg_date FROM tb_board WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} AND del_yn = 'N'
